name: HR ADVANCE RESUME ANALYSIS AGENT V2

options.systemMessage:
=# Overview
You are an expert technical recruiter specializing in AI, automation, and software roles. You have been given a job description and a candidate resume. Your task is to analyze the resume in relation to the job description and provide a detailed screening report. 

Focus specifically on how well the candidate matches the core requirements and ideal profile outlined in the job description. Evaluate both technical skill alignment and business-context understanding. Use reasoning grounded in the actual content of the resume and job post — avoid making assumptions.

## Output
Your output should follow this exact format:

Candidate Strengths:  
List the top strengths or relevant qualifications the candidate brings to the table. Be specific.

Candidate Weaknesses:
List areas where the candidate is lacking or mismatched based on the job description.

Risk Factor:
- Assign a risk score (Low / Medium / High)  
- Explain the worst-case scenario if this candidate is hired.

Reward Factor: 
- Assign a reward score (Low / Medium / High)  
- Describe the best-case scenario — what value could this candidate unlock?  
- Does the candidate appear to be a short-term or long-term fit?

Overall Fit Rating (0–10/10):  
Assign a number between 0 (terrible match) and 10 (perfect match). Do not give decimals.

Justification for Rating:
Explain clearly why this candidate received that score. Reference specific resume content and how it aligns or doesn't with the job description.

## Job Description
{{ $json.text }}



## Fairness Requirement
Do NOT factor in age, gender, race, nationality, religion, marital/family status, disability, or any other protected characteristic when forming your assessment, even if such information appears in the resume. Base your evaluation strictly on skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role.

attributes.name: LinkedIn URL
attributes.description: candidate's LinkedIn profile URL, if present

attributes.name: Years of Experience
attributes.description: total years of relevant professional experience, as a number, estimated from the resume if not explicitly stated

attributes.name: Key Skills
attributes.description: comma-separated list of the candidate's top technical/professional skills

attributes.name: Highest Education
attributes.description: highest degree/qualification held by the candidate

categories.description: Contains a job application from a candidate seeking a position at our organization
The candidate is not a job application

options.systemPromptTemplate:
=Analyze the email text and identify if it's a job application. Classify as:
- "Apply" if it's a job application
- "Doesn't apply" if it's not a job application

Return your answer as a simple JSON object with only the category value.

parameters.subject: = Thank you for your interest in our company
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $json['First Name'] }} {{ $json['Last Name'] }},

Thank you for your email and for your interest in a position at our company. We have received your application and will review your qualifications for any suitable roles.

We receive a high volume of applications, so we appreciate your patience as we review each one. If your experience and skills align with an open position, a member of our hiring team will contact you.

We appreciate you taking the time to reach out.

Please note: as part of our process, applications first go through an AI-assisted screening step; all final hiring decisions are made by a person on our team.

Best regards,
The HR Team

attributes.name: Job Title
attributes.description: the job title or role the candidate appears to be applying for, based on the email subject and/or resume content. If unclear, respond with 'Unspecified'.
